functions.name: BySelection
functions.description: Filter the array based on Object's selection.

functions.name: ByLevelName
functions.description: Filter the array by Level the Actor belongs to.

functions.name: ByLayer
functions.description: Filter the array by Layer the Actor belongs to.

functions.name: ByIDName
functions.description: Filter the array based on the Object's ID name.

functions.name: ByClass
functions.description: Filter the array based on the Object's class.

functions.name: ByActorTag
functions.description: Filter the array by Tag the Actor contains

functions.name: ByActorLabel
functions.description: Filter the array based on the Actor's label (what we see in the editor)
